title: Explain a Mystery Command
description: Use gh copilot explain to decode complex shell commands you've never seen before.
instructions:
## 🔍 Explain a Mystery Command

Welcome to your first GitHub Copilot CLI challenge!

**GitHub Copilot CLI** helps you understand and write shell commands using natural language. One of its most powerful features is `gh copilot explain`, which breaks down any command into plain English.

---

### Your Mission

You've inherited a server and found a `mystery.sh` script. Before running it, you want to understand what each command does.

**Step 1 — Read the mystery script:**

```bash
cat mystery.sh
```

**Step 2 — Use Copilot to explain a command:**

Pick any command from the script and ask Copilot to explain it:

```bash
gh copilot explain "find . -name '*.log' -mtime +7 -delete"
```

**Step 3 — Try explaining the whole pipeline:**

```bash
gh copilot explain "ps aux | grep python | awk '{print $2}' | xargs kill"
```

---

### 🎯 Goal

Explain at least **3 different commands** from the script using `gh copilot explain`.

> **Tip:** You can explain any command — not just ones in the file. Try ones you see in your day-to-day work!
hints: gh copilot explain "<paste your command here>"
